title: ARE WE FRIENDS
overview: A group of charismatic Let's Players are brought into a closed stage where they must reach 100,000,000 views, but the possibility of death is very real.

title: BORN THIS WAY
overview: The Let's Players raise their ideal girl from an egg and help her get along with the school's idol. Problem is, everyone has their own opinion of what ideal is.

title: CLUMSY PRETENDER
overview: As punishment for going where they shouldn't, the players are forced to exterminate man-eating creatures that can take the shape of anybody.

title: DAYDREAM AND NIGHTMARE
overview: The players are to rescue some abducted pure maidens but the demons who took them are cheat-level strong. Will their plan to trick them work out in the end?

title: DUSK AND DAWN
overview: Zakuro and Kaikoku go on a mission to save Akatsuki and Karen from demons. In the process, Zakuro may find a hint about his missing little sister's whereabouts.

title: ERASE MY REALITY
overview: In order to obtain Chromosome 05, Anya and Himiko must venture deep into desert ruins where there's a heavy price to be paid for any lies spoken.

title: FOOTSTEPS OUTSIDE
overview: Three sinister sisters prowl through the players' rooms in a frightening game of hide-and-seek where everyone's sight and eyeballs are on the line.

title: GLIMPSE OF ADULTHOOD
overview: Though given a chance to relax and enjoy the day, a part of the group risks their lives for a glimpse of adulthood in the outdoor bath.

title: HEAVEN WHITE AND HELL BLACK
overview: Kaikoku makes a startling discovery during his confinement while the others struggle to assemble a baffling puzzle in hopes of rescuing him before time is up.

title: HOLD ON AND LET GO
overview: While Yuzu borrows Karin to tackle the White Puzzle, Kaikoku in the underground encounters a creature that attempts to swallow him whole.

title: ISOLATED SOUL
overview: To beat the next stage, half of the group has to look after a few troublesome kids. One of them is in desperate need of some extra love and attention.

title: JOURNEY GOES ON
overview: The stakes are high in a bonus stage where the players gamble to win Paka prizes. The ultimate reward is a ticket to make any single request come true.
